content.content:
1	version: '3.8'
2	
3	services:
4	  # ============================================================
5	  # MySQL 8.0 - Relational data store
6	  # ============================================================
7	  mysql:
8	    image: mysql:8.0
9	    container_name: ica-mysql
10	    restart: unless-stopped
11	    ports:
12	      - "3306:3306"
13	    environment:
14	      MYSQL_ROOT_PASSWORD: ${MYSQL_ROOT_PASSWORD:-root123}
15	      MYSQL_DATABASE: ${MYSQL_DATABASE:-coding_assistant}
16	    volumes:
17	      - mysql-data:/var/lib/mysql
18	      - ./docker/mysql/init.sql:/docker-entrypoint-initdb.d/01-init.sql:ro
19	    command: >
20	      --character-set-server=utf8mb4
21	      --collation-server=utf8mb4_unicode_ci
22	      --default-authentication-plugin=mysql_native_password
23	      --max_connections=200
24	      --innodb_buffer_pool_size=256M
25	    healthcheck:
26	      test: ["CMD", "mysqladmin", "ping", "-h", "localhost", "-u", "root", "-p${MYSQL_ROOT_PASSWORD:-root123}"]
27	      interval: 10s
28	      timeout: 5s
29	      retries: 10
30	      start_period: 30s
31	    networks:
32	      - ica-network
33	
34	  # ============================================================
35	  # Neo4j 5 - Knowledge graph store
36	  # ============================================================
37	  neo4j:
38	    image: neo4j:5
39	    container_name: ica-neo4j
40	    restart: unless-stopped
41	    ports:
42	      - "7474:7474"   # HTTP browser
43	      - "7687:7687"   # Bolt protocol
44	    environment:
45	      NEO4J_AUTH: ${NEO4J_USER:-neo4j}/${NEO4J_PASSWORD:-neo4j123}
46	      NEO4J_PLUGINS: '["apoc"]'
47	      NEO4J_server_memory_heap_initial__size: 256m
48	      NEO4J_server_memory_heap_max__size: 512m
49	    volumes:
50	      - neo4j-data:/data
51	      - neo4j-logs:/logs
52	      - ./docker/neo4j/init-data.cypher:/var/lib/neo4j/import/init-data.cypher:ro
53	    healthcheck:
54	      test: ["CMD-SHELL", "wget --no-verbose --tries=1 --spider http://localhost:7474 || exit 1"]
55	      interval: 10s
56	      timeout: 5s
57	      retries: 10
58	      start_period: 30s
59	    networks:
60	      - ica-network
61	
62	  # ============================================================
63	  # Redis 7 - Cache store
64	  # ============================================================
65	  redis:
66	    image: redis:7-alpine
67	    container_name: ica-redis
68	    restart: unless-stopped
69	    ports:
70	      - "6379:6379"
71	    command: ["redis-server", "--appendonly", "yes"]
72	    volumes:
73	      - redis-data:/data
74	    healthcheck:
75	      test: ["CMD", "redis-cli", "ping"]
76	      interval: 10s
77	      timeout: 5s
78	      retries: 10
79	      start_period: 20s
80	    networks:
81	      - ica-network
82	
83	  # ============================================================
84	  # Backend - Spring Boot application
85	  # ============================================================
86	  backend:
87	    build:
88	      context: ./backend
89	      dockerfile: Dockerfile
90	    container_name: ica-backend
91	    restart: unless-stopped
92	    expose:
93	      - "8080"
94	    environment:
95	      # Spring profile
96	      SPRING_PROFILES_ACTIVE: ${SPRING_PROFILES_ACTIVE:-prod}
97	
98	      # MySQL (mapped to application-*.yml placeholders)
99	      MYSQL_HOST: mysql
100	      MYSQL_PORT: 3306
